g.text: Every element labelled with its name and CSS class · discussion (main) screen · v3.1.0-dev.110
Write a note… #tag to classify, @ to mention a name
Investigate the cache-busting strategy for the asset
Reviewed the new print layout — ref
Conﬁrm the vendor SLA before the cutover.
3 Print — prints the .md as plain Markdown (#btnPrintChrome)
11 Tag group header — colored per tag (ui.getDiscTagColor)
24 Entry controls: goal link · due · Save (.btn-primary)
27 Meta row: time · state square · priority square · tags
37 Goal card — purple stripe (.entry-goal; mirrors Goals panel)
38 Followup card — cyan stripe (.entry-followup; mirrors panel)
34 Links panel (.links-section — links extracted from comments)
35 Images gallery (.gallery-section — thumbnails match inline images)
• Sidebar groups discussions under colored tags with a ﬁlter row;
each discussion has an inline tag chip (#18).
• Per-discussion search (#20) mirrors the cross-view search bar.
• Print (#3) renders the .md as regular Markdown, not the styled view.
• AI Summary page adds a "Remove names" privacy toggle (.summary-privacy)
that anonymizes names to initials (PS, MRL) before calling the API.
• Startup reconciles navigation.chippy.md with the folder's ﬁles
(folder = source of truth: stale entries dropped, new ﬁles added).
Stream shows task, goal, comment, followup & collapsed-done cards.
